STOCK_POWER.description: When killed, afflicts [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], then a new Axebot is summoned in its place.
CONSTRICT_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, take [blue]1[/blue] damage.
CONSTRICT_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of your turn, take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage.
ACT3BUFF-EPHEMERAL_POWER.title: Ephemeral
ACT3BUFF-EPHEMERAL_POWER.description: After taking damage 3 times during your turn, gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold].
ACT3BUFF-EPHEMERAL_POWER.smartDescriptio: After taking damage {Amount} times during your turn, gains [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold].
